query: Suno AI Songkick acquisition live music concert integration announcement year
a_issues: All results confirm November acquisition and integration plans, but none explicitly state the year (2025) for the November acquisition date, leaving some ambiguity about whether it was Nov 2024 or Nov 2025 without cross-referencing.
b_issues: Also doesn't explicitly state '2025' next to the November acquisition date in most snippets, but the LinkedIn result explicitly states 'In November 2025, Suno bought Songkick... from Warner Music Group,' directly confirming the year, which content A lacks entirely.
reasoning: Both sets agree on the core facts: Suno acquired Songkick from WMG in November as part of a settlement/licensing deal, and Suno is now integrating Songkick's data and planning AI-powered concert discovery features via a General Manager hire. However, Content B includes a LinkedIn post explicitly stating 'In November 2025, Suno bought Songkick,' which directly answers the 'year' component of the question. Content A's results only say 'November' or 'last November' without ever stating the year explicitly, requiring inference from publication dates (which are themselves oddly dated 2026, adding confusion). This makes B slightly more complete and directly answering for the year-specific part of the query, while both are otherwise equally reliable and consistent on the core acquisition/integration facts.
